title: Native Config and MCP Lifecycle Evidence
purpose: Proves native config materialization and MCP temp-file lifecycle rules from source checks instead of hand-written policy prose.

facts.name: policy owns native hook decision
facts.summary: Claude command-hook audit is the only native hook surface and requires known trust tier plus bundle allow.

facts.name: policy owns native config file decision
facts.summary: Codex task-scoped config home is typed but not allowed by the default local policy bundle.

facts.name: supervisor applies policy before workdir injection
facts.summary: supervisor converts denied Claude hooks to instruction-only and denied Codex config-home to disabled mode.

facts.name: workdir materializes deterministic native config evidence
facts.summary: workdir records generated files in the native config manifest and writes Claude hook artifacts only when the plan includes them.

facts.name: Codex config home remains disabled by default
facts.summary: Codex primary instruction file remains AGENTS.md while .codex/config.toml is absent when config home mode is disabled.

facts.name: MCP config path is a temp-file capability
facts.summary: Claude StartCommand includes strict MCP args only when a path exists and registers that path in TempFiles.

facts.name: session owns MCP temp-file cleanup
facts.summary: session cleanup runs after provider finish and tests cover process exit, cancellation, and timeout cleanup paths.

absent_surfaces.name: workdir does not decide policy
absent_surfaces.reason: C6 materializes the resolved plan; C7/C4 policy decisions stay outside workdir.

absent_surfaces.name: Codex adapter does not invent task-scoped CODEX_HOME
absent_surfaces.reason: Codex auth/env preservation is allowed, but task-scoped config home materialization is not default behavior.

absent_surfaces.name: Claude adapter does not inline raw MCP JSON in args
absent_surfaces.reason: provider command receives --mcp-config path and reports temp files, not raw MCP JSON payloads.

source_checks.name: default-denies-codex-home
source_checks.contains: local default must not materialize Codex task-scoped config home

source_checks.name: provider-codex-no-invent-home
source_checks.contains: Codex adapter must not invent CODEX_HOME

source_checks.name: claude-mcp-test
source_checks.contains: MCP config path should be registered as a temp file

assertions: workdir materializes only a supervisor-resolved native config plan
Claude audit hooks require policy allow and known trust tier
Codex task-scoped config home remains disabled by default
MCP config is passed by path and registered as session-owned temp file
session cleanup removes MCP temp files after exit, cancellation, and timeout
